description_long: This is a stylized doll with light blue hair styled in two large buns, wearing a gray button-up shirt with rolled sleeves and black shorts. The doll's shirt features visible buttons and a collar, while the shorts have a fitted appearance and are paired with brown lace-up boots. The facial features are large and anime-inspired, with big eyes and a small mouth, giving the doll a youthful and expressive look. The skin tone is fair, and the proportions are slightly exaggerated, typical of anime or manga character designs. The overall appearance is clean and well-defined, with smooth surfaces and subtle shading to suggest fabric and hair texture. The doll is designed to stand upright and is likely made from a combination of plastic and synthetic fibers.
description: Anime-style doll with blue hair in buns, gray shirt, black shorts, and brown boots. Features large expressive eyes and smooth, stylized surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's face, blue hair buns, gray shirt, black shorts, and brown boots with arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the volume of the hair buns, and the layered look of the shirt and shorts.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hair buns, the shirt's back, shorts, and boots, with arms outstretched.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, hair bun, and the side seam details of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_style: Casual modern style with a gray button-up shirt featuring rolled sleeves, black fitted shorts, and brown lace-up ankle boots. The outfit is simple and practical, with no visible patterns or logos.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and parallel, head facing forward, and torso erect. The pose is static and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with slightly parted lips, wide open eyes, and relaxed eyebrows, conveying a calm and composed demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Light blue hair styled in two large, symmetrical buns on either side of the head, with short bangs framing the forehead and a smooth, slightly shiny texture.
